education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

Floated across multiple stations, quickly adapting to new assembly tasks and maintaining production flow.
Collaborated with team members to meet daily production targets in a high-volume environment.

bullets: Operated powered industrial equipment to improve throughput and reduce material handling time.
Coordinated with team members to consistently meet production and shipping deadlines.

work.title: Sales Associate
bullets: Advised customers on home improvement products, consistently driving upsells through product knowledge.

projects.name: Flashcard Roguelike (Capstone)

projects.name: Kimberly-Clark Hackathon — Schedule Optimizer (Top 5)
